name: Greek Breakfast Bagel
method: Beat the eggs, spice, and peppers together; set them aside.
Heat the olive oil over medium-high heat in a frying pan; fry the
vegetables for about four minutes, or begin to soften.
Insert spinach; fry for around two minutes until it is wilted
Put in beaten egg; fry for three or four minutes or until soft curds
begin to develop from the egg mixture.
Mix in cheese from the feta. Spoon over the halves of bagels.
